note: This is a stub trace demonstrating the format. Replace with a real recorded trace captured via: node scripts/rewrite-parity-record.mjs (or PARITY_RECORD=1 node scripts/rewrite-parity-replay.mjs). The recorder drives an autonomous session on the legacy server and writes docs/parity-traces/real-YYYYMMDD.json. Commands must be executable against both the legacy server and the rewrite gateway from the same starting world state (same seed, same snapshot import). Run against staging: REWRITE_WS_URL=wss://border-empires-gateway-staging.fly.dev/ws node scripts/rewrite-parity-replay.mjs docs/parity-traces/real-YYYYMMDD.json

commands.description: Expand to an adjacent frontier tile
Settle the newly captured frontier tile
Choose a tech (if not already chosen)
Build a fort on owned tile

expectedFinalState.note: Expected state is not enforced by the harness — it only diffs legacy vs rewrite. Fill this in after a green parity run.
